message.content:
@startuml
participant A as "A" #D3D8E5
entity CircuitBreaker as "CircuitBreaker" 
participant B as "B" #D3D8E5

alt [no errors]
    activate A
    ->> CircuitBreaker : call()
        activate CircuitBreaker
        
            -->> B : call()
                activate B
                
                    <<-->> CircuitBreaker : response
                    
                        deactivate B
                        
                            <--<< A : response
            
            deactivate CircuitBreaker
    
    deactivate A
else [errors]
    
    -->>+ CircuitBreaker : call()
        
        loop while err_count < max_errors
            -x->>+ B : call()
            
            <-[hidden]- self++ : err_count ++
                
                endloop
                
                <->-self : sleep(timeout)
                    
                    -X-->+ B : call()
                        
                        <->-[#0000FF][dashed,self]:sleep(timeout*2)[[#black]]
                            
                            -X->[#96417F]+[[#white]][[#blue]]B:[[#red]]call()[[#green]]
                                
                                <<-[-[#purple],thick,dotted,#gray,error message style=bold error font color=#yellow size = 14px ]error [[fontcolor=purple fontsize=italic underline=true ]]message text decoration=line-through alignment=center horizontalAlignement=top verticalAlignment=text-top direction=northwest rotation=-angle degrees clockwise from north east corner of bounding box around object
